goal: Prevent Vercel from building Mainline internal actor branches

summary.title: Skip Vercel builds for Mainline internal branches
summary.what: Added a Vercel ignored-build command that skips branches under _mainline/* while allowing main and normal website branches to build. Also set the same command at the Vercel project level so branches that contain only Mainline actor event data are ignored before npm tries to read package.json.
summary.why: Vercel was building _mainline/actor/actor_89461ee8 as a preview deployment, but that branch only contains event.json. Because there is no package.json on that internal branch, the deployment failed before Astro or the website code ran.
summary.user_goal: Fix the Vercel ENOENT package.json failure caused by Mainline internal actor branches.

decisions.chose: Use Vercel's ignored-build command to skip only refs whose VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_REF starts with _mainline/.
decisions.rationale: This targets Mainline internal branches without disabling production builds or ordinary preview builds for real website work.

decisions.chose: Set the ignore command both in vercel.json and in Vercel Project Settings.
decisions.rationale: The failing actor branch does not contain vercel.json, so the project-level setting is required for this specific failure mode; the repo-level setting documents the policy for normal branches.

decisions.chose: Use a POSIX test expression instead of a script file.
decisions.rationale: The command must run even when the checked-out branch has no project files, so it cannot depend on package.json, npm scripts, or repository scripts.

rejected.reason: Mainline actor branches are internal event refs, not deployable website source trees.
The immediate failure only affects _mainline/* branches, and normal preview deployments may still be useful.

acknowledged_constraints.note: This change only touches Vercel deployment filtering and does not modify localized homepage copy.

review_notes: Confirmed the failing commit e9de263 on _mainline/actor/actor_89461ee8 contains only event.json.
Verified the ignore command returns 0 for _mainline/actor/actor_89461ee8 and 1 for main.
Verified the Vercel project now has commandForIgnoringBuildStep set to the same expression.
Ran npm run build locally with 0 Astro check errors.
Pushed commit 6d8fa4d to main and verified the production Vercel deployment completed successfully for https://mainline.sh.

architectural_claims: Mainline internal _mainline/* Git refs are not deployable website source trees and should be ignored by Vercel.
The Vercel project-level ignored build step is the authoritative guard for branches that do not contain vercel.json.
behavioral_changes: Vercel skips deployments when VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_REF begins with _mainline/.
Production builds from main continue to run npm run build.
security_implications: No user data, credentials, authentication, or public runtime behavior changed.
The Vercel project setting was changed through the authenticated Vercel API but no tokens or secrets were added to the repo.
migration_notes: Past failed preview deployments remain in Vercel history; future pushes to _mainline/* should be skipped before npm runs.
If the site moves to another Vercel project, copy the ignored-build command into that project's settings as well as vercel.json.
